name: Luna
author: avatar-forge
notes: Design = soft-goth: platinum-white hair (#E9E7F2), amethyst eyes (#7B4FA6), dark velvet dress (#171019). Palette recolors the base's Hair/Iris/Outfit materials. Bespoke hair/outfit GEOMETRY is a roadmap item — it needs a base that already has those meshes (your VRoid export) or a modeling step.
